title: Massachusetts Association of Disability Examiners — Boston (M.A.D.E.-B) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing constitution and by-laws of the Massachusetts Association of Disability Examiners – Boston (M.A.D.E.-B), a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Covers name and affiliation, the Boston-area counties served (Middlesex, Essex, Suffolk, Norfolk, Bristol, Plymouth, Barnstable, Dukes, Nantucket), purpose, membership (no dues), the Executive Board and officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary, Treasurer), duties of officers, meetings, the Constitution & By-Laws and Membership committees, parliamentary authority, and amendments. Includes notes on 1985 and 1987 Executive Board/membership changes (including the 1987 split into two chapters).
geographic_coverage: Eastern Massachusetts (Boston-area counties: Middlesex, Essex, Suffolk, Norfolk, Bristol, Plymouth, Barnstable, Dukes, Nantucket)

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Massachusetts / Boston Chapter (M.A.D.E.-B)
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Massachusetts Association of Disability Examiners – Boston

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Massachusetts-Boston-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived and the source contains OCR-style artifacts (e.g. 'EXECUT1VE', 'cf 25 percent') preserved as-converted. Closing notes record Executive Board changes approved 03/14/1985 (membership vote 05/14/1985) and a 04/29/1987 change splitting the chapter in two (membership vote 05/13/1987), captured as temporal_coverage 1985-1987. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
